description: Federal civil complaint with caption, numbered paragraphs, and exhibit references.
source: PACER Public Access — https://pcl.uscourts.gov/pcl/pages/welcome.jsf — download any civil complaint (docket item 1). Many courts post complaints free on their websites.

metadata.note: Update pageCount to match your obtained PDF before running benchmark.

legalArtifacts.manualEvalNote: Verify: (1) Exhibit A/B/C references preserved inline, (2) attorney signature block (bar number, firm name) at end.

clauseContinuity.manualEvalNote: Numbered paragraphs spanning a page boundary should not be split. Score 5 = all joined, score 3 = 2–3 split.
